positive: Minimalist stylized illustration of a cosmic sloth in deep space, drifting among bioluminescent nebula clouds. The sloth has a serene, whimsical expression, rendered with clean, bold vector lines and a strong silhouette against a deep indigo and violet cosmic background. Utilize stippling and halftone patterns for texture on the nebula, contrasting with solid blocks of color for the sloth. Composition must be central and balanced. Style: Pop art meets celestial watercolor, perfect for apparel printing. Lighting: Soft, ethereal glow emanating from the nebula. High contrast, vibrant color palette, clean edges, vector art quality, no photorealism, art deco influences.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noise, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, ugly, distorted, extra limbs, poorly drawn, amateur, sketch, gradient noise
